The first lecture and live interview with Professor Sarah Paine is tonight!
This one on Japan during WW2. If you can't make it in person, you can livestream it via the [Substack app](https://substack.com/redirect/60bde671-fb8a-4f69-889a-ba3afd20a24e?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o).
Just [download the app](https://substack.com/redirect/60bde671-fb8a-4f69-889a-ba3afd20a24e?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o) and subscribe to me. Around 7 PM Pacific you'll see the live video front & center on the homepage in the app.
Very excited!
